landing.heroTitleBreak: but a three days of journey.
landing.heroSubtitle: Every 3 days in your world is 1 full day of life in ToThereOn
landing.syncDescription: Every 3 days in your world is 1 full day of life in ToThereOn. While you work, sleep, and live, your pet is exploring their new home at their own pace.

registerPet.title: Register Pet
registerPet.description: Provide basic info to begin the journey of meeting your pet. Register basics first, then share your pet's unique stories.

deepRemembrance.title: Deep Remembrance
deepRemembrance.description: Recall the unique details that define your pet's spirit. We'll weave your precious memories into a heart-felt, living image.

writeLetter.title: Write a Letter
writeLetter.description: Write a letter to your pet and receive a reply filled with love. Reconnect through the beautiful stories only the two of you share.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.signupRequired: Please sign up to access this feature
